phrases.context: Use this when you want to ask the price of an item.

phrases.english: I want to buy this shirt.
phrases.context: Use this when you have decided to purchase a specific item.

phrases.english: Do you have this in a smaller size?
phrases.context: Use this when the item is too big and you need a different size.

phrases.english: Can I pay with a credit card?
phrases.context: Use this to inquire about payment methods.
Use this when you need to try on clothes before buying.
